---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something that would help on match day
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What's the use case?**
Describe the match-day situation this would help with. Real-world context is more useful than a feature list.

**What would you like to happen?**
A clear description of the feature or change.

**Have you got a workaround at the moment?**
If so, what is it?

**Anything else?**
Mockups, examples from other broadcast tools, or anything else that helps explain the idea.
